characters.name: Ada
characters.description: Adawas anSTOmartyr in aholobanddemonstration to pitch the idea ofApotheosisto theMonotheist Churchleadership onGemenon.

characters.name: Ada
characters.description: Adawas anSTOmartyr in aholobanddemonstration to pitch the idea ofApotheosisto theMonotheist Churchleadership onGemenon.

characters.name: Ada's Mother
characters.description: Ada's MotherdropsAdaoff atAtlas Arenafor apyramidgame between theCaprica Buccaneersand the Gemenon Twins. Ada hugs her mother longer than usual. This prompts her mother to ask if she is alright. Ada assures her she is. Then she gets out of the car to go to the game. Ada's Mother has no clue that her daughter is anSTOmartyr planning to blow up the arena to further the cause ofmonotheism. This scenario is actually aholobanddemonstration to pitch the idea ofApotheosisto theMonotheist Churchon Gemenon.

characters.name: Ada's Mother

characters.name: Adama
characters.description: TheAdamasare aTauronfamily who live inCaprica City. They have strong connections to their homeworld, other local Taurons, and to a Tauron-based criminal organization, theHa'la'tha. William and Isabelle Adama William Adama Sr.andIsabelle Adamawere poor farmers on the planet Tauron. They had two sons,JosephandSam. They were members of a Tauron resistance group called the Ha'la'tha. The Ha'la'tha fought the corrupt Tauron government, its military arm, theHeraclides, and their murder squads.

characters.name: Isabelle Adama
characters.description: Isabelle AdamaisJoseph's andSam's mother.William Adama Sr.is her husband and they are Tauron farmers. She and her husband are secret members of theHa'la'tharesistance. The Ha'la'tha rebel against the corrupt, fascist and oppressive Tauron government.("The Dirteaters") In 12YR Joseph receives his mark of manhood at age thirteen. The mark is a symbol of faithfulness to the soil. He learned the ancient prayers and passages of theSacred Scrollsto prepare for this day. Sam is jealous and wants his mark too, but he is not yet of age.

characters.name: Isabelle Adama
characters.description: Isabelle AdamaisJoseph's andSam's mother.William Adama Sr.is her husband and they are Tauron farmers. She and her husband are secret members of theHa'la'tharesistance. The Ha'la'tha rebel against the corrupt, fascist and oppressive Tauron government.("The Dirteaters") In 12YR Joseph receives his mark of manhood at age thirteen. The mark is a symbol of faithfulness to the soil. He learned the ancient prayers and passages of theSacred Scrollsto prepare for this day. Sam is jealous and wants his mark too, but he is not yet of age.

characters.name: Joseph Adama
characters.description: Joseph Adama(Yoseef, Joe) is a lawyer who representsHa'la'thainterests inCaprica City. He is also known as Joseph Adams. His wife,Shannon, and daughter,Tamara, are killed in theMAGLEV Bombing. He lives with his surviving son,William, and his mother-in-law,Ruth, in an apartment at615 Olympic Street, No. 3in theLittle Tauronneighborhood in Caprica City.("Pilot") Sam and Joseph, orphaned and homeless on Tauron Joseph wants what is best for William. Although he works for the Ha'la'tha, he stays away from the darker aspects of the organization. He is reluctant to kill anyone, even inV-World, but he does have a breaking point, where he will murder several V-Worldavatarsto get what he wants. Even during this incident, he gives the other players a chance to leave.("Ghosts in the Machine") Joseph is also fairly naive, which frustrates a number of other people, namely his brother, Sam.("Gravedancing")

characters.name: Sam Adama
characters.description: Sam Adama(Samuel) is an enforcer (and later a captain) with theTauroncrime syndicate,Ha'la'tha. He is a family man - loyal and devoted to hishusband, his brotherJosephand hisfamily. Family is more important to him than the law. The most important things to him are family, his Tauron heritage and the Ha'la'tha.("Pilot") ("Reins of a Waterfall") ("The Dirteaters") Sam and Joseph, orphaned and homeless on Tauron

characters.name: Sam Adama
characters.description: Sam Adama(Samuel) is an enforcer (and later a captain) with theTauroncrime syndicate,Ha'la'tha. He is a family man - loyal and devoted to hishusband, his brotherJosephand hisfamily. Family is more important to him than the law. The most important things to him are family, his Tauron heritage and the Ha'la'tha.("Pilot") ("Reins of a Waterfall") ("The Dirteaters") Sam and Joseph, orphaned and homeless on Tauron

characters.name: Shannon Adama
characters.description: Shannon Adamawas the wife ofJoseph Adama. She and their daughter,Tamara, were killed in theMAGLEV Bombing, a terrorist act perpetrated by theSoldiers of the One.("Pilot") Shannon and her mother,Ruth, leftTauronand immigrated toCapricaat an unknown time in the past, perhaps during theTauron Civil War. Her maiden name is unknown as are the whereabouts of her father. When she married Joseph, she took on the Capricanized version of his last name, Adams, which he adopted in an attempt to blend in better with Caprican society. She and Joseph had two children, Tamara andWilliam.("Pilot")

characters.name: Shannon Adama
characters.description: Shannon Adamawas the wife ofJoseph Adama. She and their daughter,Tamara, were killed in theMAGLEV Bombing, a terrorist act perpetrated by theSoldiers of the One.("Pilot") Shannon and her mother,Ruth, leftTauronand immigrated toCapricaat an unknown time in the past, perhaps during theTauron Civil War. Her maiden name is unknown as are the whereabouts of her father. When she married Joseph, she took on the Capricanized version of his last name, Adams, which he adopted in an attempt to blend in better with Caprican society. She and Joseph had two children, Tamara andWilliam.("Pilot")

characters.name: Tamara Adama
characters.description: Tamara Adama(Tammy) is the daughter ofJosephandShannon Adama, and older sister ofWilliam Adama. Tamara was born in 26YR. She went by her father's Capricanized last name, Adams. She attendedPromethia High School. Her UncleSamsaid that Tamara was going to make thefamilyproud.("Pilot") ("Rebirth") ("Gravedancing") Tamara on a fishing trip with her family in 41YR

characters.name: Tamara Adama
characters.description: Tamara Adama(Tammy) is the daughter ofJosephandShannon Adama, and older sister ofWilliam Adama. Tamara was born in 26YR. characters.name: William Adama
characters.description: William Adama(Willie, Will) isJosephandShannon Adama's son. William was born onMaius7, 29YR and was named after hisgrandfather.[1]Willie lives with his father andgrandmotherat615 Olympic Street, No. 3inCaprica City. He is a student atWilson Elementary.("Pilot") ("There Is Another Sky") He does not like traditional Tauron food, which consists primarily of organ meats. He does like hamburgers and also the cherry cake his grandmother makes.("Pilot") ("Rebirth")

characters.name: William Adama

characters.name: Young Bill Adama
characters.description: Young Bill Adama(William) was born in 43YR toEvelynandJoseph Adama. Bill Adama was born in 43YR in the coastal community ofQualaionCaprica.("Battlestar Galactica: Hero")He also lived in his father'sapartmentinLittle TauroninCaprica City.("Apotheosis") Bill is named in memory of his deceased, older half-brother,Willie, perTauroncustom. Like Willie, he was named after his grandfather,William Adama Sr.("Pilot") ("Apotheosis")

characters.name: Young Bill Adama
characters.description: Young Bill Adama(William) was born in 43YR toEvelynandJoseph Adama. Like Willie, he was named after his grandfather,William Adama Sr.("Pilot") ("Apotheosis")

characters.name: Agent Alpert
characters.description: Agent Alpert(Alpy) worked in the Evidence Lockup Room at theGlobal Defense Department. Jordan Duramneeded to get a camera (covertly forAmanda Graystoneto use atClarice Willow's house), but did not want anyone to know, so he did not sign in. He gave cigarettes to Alpert for a smoke break so he would look the other way.

characters.name: Agent Alpert
characters.description: Agent Alpert(Alpy) worked in the Evidence Lockup Room at theGlobal Defense Department. Jordan Duramneeded to get a camera (covertly forAmanda Graystoneto use atClarice Willow's house), but did not want anyone to know, so he did not sign in. He gave cigarettes to Alpert for a smoke break so he would look the other way.

characters.name: Alvo
characters.description: Alvois theavatarof a shadowySTOoperative in theVirtual World.Clarice Willowoccasionally meets with him in a confession booth. The screen of the booth is semi-transparent, allowing only a silhouette of Alvo to be seen. Alvo's voice is distorted preventing any further identification, therefore providing complete anonymity.("Reins of a Waterfall") Clarice puts on aholobandand virtually meets with Alvo against his wishes. She tells him that they are close to gettingZoe Graystone'ssentient avatar, which will help theSoldiers of the Oneserve the Lord throughapotheosis. Alvo is upset that her actions have brought scrutiny on the organization and tells her that not everyone shares her beliefs.("Reins of a Waterfall") Alvo tells Clarice that theChurchdoes not want apotheosis. Clarice says they do not understand it. They do not get it. She wants a meeting with the Conclave so she can show them the value of it. Alvo says they supportBarnabasand she will just have to accept that. He tells her that God expects us to place our faith in God's emissaries. Clarice says that Barnabas is not an emissary. He just does the church's dirty work. She asks for more time to develop her plan and then she can show them a gloriousafterlifethat we can see and touch.("Know Thy Enemy")

characters.name: Amphead
characters.description: Ampheadis anampjunkieavatarwho took possession ofJoseph Adama's flat inNew Cap City. Joseph andEmmanuelleare looking forTamaraso they go to the Adama "home" in New Cap City to find her. They break in and corner the Amphead. Joseph interrogates him.  Amphead does not know anything. He thinks they want his drugs.  Joseph shows him a photo of Tamara.  Amphead recognizes her as the Dead Girl - a new character who is part of the program. She cannot be killed because she is already dead.  He tells them Tamara has been seen at the Mysteries Burlesque Club.

characters.name: Amphead
characters.description: Ampheadis anampjunkieavatarwho took possession ofJoseph Adama's flat inNew Cap City. She cannot be killed because she is already dead.  He tells them Tamara has been seen at the Mysteries Burlesque Club.

characters.name: Angry Crowd No 1
characters.description: AfterAmanda Graystone's confession that her daughterZoe Graystonewas responsible for theMAGLEV bombing, the crowd at thememorial serviceerupts into pandemonium. The Graystones hurriedly leave to avoid the furious mob. Anangry manshouts at the Graystones as they speed away in their car.

characters.name: Angry Woman
characters.description: TheAngry Womanis part of a protest atCaprica General Hospital. In the wake ofAmanda Graystone's confession that her daughterZoewas responsible for theMAGLEV bombing, angry citizens protest againstGraystone Industriesat the hospital where Amanda has just resigned. As Amanda is leaving the hospital and heading towards her car, the woman yells at Amanda that herdaughterkilled her husband.

characters.name: Angry Woman
characters.description: TheAngry Womanis part of a protest atCaprica General Hospital. In the wake ofAmanda Graystone's confession that her daughterZoewas responsible for theMAGLEV bombing, angry citizens protest againstGraystone Industriesat the hospital where Amanda has just resigned. As Amanda is leaving the hospital and heading towards her car, the woman yells at Amanda that herdaughterkilled her husband.

characters.name: Anthem Singer
characters.description: TheAnthem Singersang theCapricanNational Anthem beforeCaprica Buccaneerspyramidgames atAtlas Arena.("Rebirth") ("Apotheosis") He sang the anthem before the game between the Caprica Buccaneers and theDelphiLegion. He was interrupted when military planes carryingU-87robots landed to stop theSoldiers of the Onefrom blowing up Atlas Arena.("Apotheosis") He was the off-camera vocalist for the anthem in the episode, "Rebirth".

characters.name: Anthem Singer
characters.description: TheAnthem Singersang theCapricanNational Anthem beforeCaprica Buccaneerspyramidgames atAtlas Arena.("Rebirth") ("Apotheosis") He sang the anthem before the game between the Caprica Buccaneers and theDelphiLegion. He was interrupted when military planes carryingU-87robots landed to stop theSoldiers of the Onefrom blowing up Atlas Arena.("Apotheosis") He was the off-camera vocalist for the anthem in the episode, "Rebirth".

characters.name: Armed Goon No. 2
characters.description: TheArmed Goon No. 2was an enforcer with theTauroncrime syndicate,Ha'la'tha. TheGuatrausent him to kill the Adama brothers. He andTommyconfrontedJosephandSam AdamaatGoldie's Off Track Betting. He asked the brothers whereFrankiewas and Joseph said Frankie was gone.Willieran into the room diverting his and Tommy's attention. A struggle ensued and the goon was shot and killed.

characters.name: Armed Goon No. 2
characters.description: TheArmed Goon No. 2was an enforcer with theTauroncrime syndicate,Ha'la'tha. TheGuatrausent him to kill the Adama brothers. He andTommyconfrontedJosephandSam AdamaatGoldie's Off Track Betting. He asked the brothers whereFrankiewas and Joseph said Frankie was gone.Willieran into the room diverting his and Tommy's attention. A struggle ensued and the goon was shot and killed.

characters.name: Ashok
characters.description: Ashokwas anavatarin theV-Clubwho controlled access toVesta. WhileTamarawas waiting to see Vesta, she saw a man playing Russian roulette shoot himself andde-rez. Tamara asked where he went. Askok said,"He went wherever...home." AfterHeraclesand Tamara successfully pulled off the heist and stoleChiron's game credits inNew Cap City, Vesta and her followers made themselves at home in Chiron's favorite club. When Tamara shot them with Heracles' gun, Askok de-rezzed with the rest of them, permanently banned from the  game.

characters.name: Ashok

When Tamara shot them with Heracles' gun, Askok de-rezzed with the rest of them, permanently banned from the  game.

characters.name: Atkinson
characters.description: Atkinsonwas a member ofGraystone Industries' Board of Directors. In the aftermath ofDaniel Graystone's visit to theBacktalk with Baxter Sarnotalk show (during which Daniel revealed Graystone Industries would no longer profit fromholobandsales and licensing), Atkinson called a board meeting to discuss ousting Graystone as CEO of his company.("There Is Another Sky") Atkinson was mentioned, but never seen.

characters.name: Atreus
characters.description: Atreuswas a mobster who was in charge of the gun trade inCaprica City. Sam Adamawas running guns toTauronto help his people in their new struggle against the corrupt Tauron government. He was shaking what guns he could off the streets. Atreus caught Sam in the act. He killed Sam's partner,Demos, but let Sam go so he could send a message to theGuatraunot to muscle in on his gun business. The Guatrau told Sam he must avenge Demos' death alone, since he acted alone without the Guatrau's consent.

characters.name: Atreus
characters.description: Atreuswas a mobster who was in charge of the gun trade inCaprica City. Sam Adamawas running guns toTauronto help his people in their new struggle against the corrupt Tauron government. He was shaking what guns he could off the streets. Atreus caught Sam in the act. He killed Sam's partner,Demos, but let Sam go so he could send a message to theGuatraunot to muscle in on his gun business. The Guatrau told Sam he must avenge Demos' death alone, since he acted alone without the Guatrau's consent.

characters.name: Steve Bahara
characters.description: Steve Baharawas a sports commentator for theCaprica Buccaneers. He worked atAtlas Arenawith his partnerAbasi Lowe.

characters.name: Steve Bahara
characters.description: Steve Baharawas a sports commentator for theCaprica Buccaneers. He worked atAtlas Arenawith his partnerAbasi Lowe.

characters.name: Barnabas
characters.description: Barnabasis aMonotheistand the leader of a radical faction of theSoldiers of the One. Barnabas inflicts pain upon himself. Wrapping a cilice around his arm, he says,"Pain keeps our brain from going down bad paths."He has a volatile temper and is prone to paranoia. Barnabas expects hisfollowersto sexually service him.[1]("Know Thy Enemy") ("Unvanquished") ("Retribution") Barnabas rejects Lacy's request. Barnabas inflicts pain upon himself. Wrapping a cilice around his arm, he says,"Pain keeps our brain from going down bad paths."He has a volatile temper and is prone to paranoia. Barnabas expects hisfollowersto sexually service him.[1]("Know Thy Enemy") ("Unvanquished") ("Retribution")

characters.name: Bartender
characters.description: TheBartenderworks at "Sinny McNutt's Slash and Cut Den of Iniquity" inNew Cap City. The Avenging Angels (TamaraandZoe) regularly show up here to challenge the gamers in their efforts to "clean up" the sin of New Cap City.  Whenever the Angels show up, the Bartender makes a big show of it. One night,NestorandOlaf Willowcome to try their luck at killing the Avenging Angels.  Nestor disbelieves that Zoe is really theZoe Graystoneavatar.  He thinks the avatar is a cheap knock off. The Angels pull guns on them.  Nestor says that is against rules - no packing heat at Sinny's. (Nestor and Olaf have swords.)  Zoe says it is New Cap City where there are no rules.  Tamara and Zoe shoot them,de-rezzingtheir avatars, permanently ejecting them from the game.

characters.name: Big Kid
characters.description: Big Kidwas a bully who tauntedJosephandWilliam Adama. He and several young people were drinking near the spot where Joseph took William fishing. He made derogatory comments aboutTaurons. Joseph told William to ignore the group, but William threw a rock at the bully, which hit him on the head. Willie then started pummeling him. Joseph had to pull his son off of the bully.
